name: omniforge
description: Local-first, open-source AI automation app for end users.
author: OmniForge contributors

scripts.dev:scheduler:install: npm run -w omniforge dev -- scheduler-service install
scripts.dev:scheduler:status: npm run -w omniforge dev -- scheduler-service status
scripts.dev:scheduler:uninstall: npm run -w omniforge dev -- scheduler-service uninstall
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
